strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud systems
Hands-on expertise in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) and modern cloud technologies
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective (open-source Geo-Data platform) and startup exposure
concerns: Limited direct AI/ML product or platform experience in the resume (AI work is recent and infrastructure-focused)
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields, though compensated by practical experience
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical breadth and deep engineering leadership, with recent AI-agent infrastructure contributions aligning well with modern cloud/AI strategy. However, his AI expertise is predominantly infrastructure-focused (MCP, tools) rather than product/platform leadership, and he lacks advanced AI degrees or recognized AI product milestones. His entrepreneurial and startup experience partially offsets this gap.
